# claudeadmin_invite (Resource)

Creates an Anthropic organization invite. Invites are immutable — changes to email or role force replacement. The `admin` role cannot be granted via invite.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeadmin_invite" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
  role  = "developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String)
- `role` (String) Org role: user, developer, billing, or claude_code_user. `admin` is not allowed.

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `invited_at` (String)
- `status` (String)
